lessons.title: Cartridge Gauge
lessons.description: Learn Gunbreaker's core mechanics: Cartridge Gauge generation, Burst Strike usage, and basic combo flow.
keyPoints: Cartridge Gauge builds from Solid Barrel combo finisher (1 cartridge)
Burst Strike: Spends 1 cartridge for high damage
Maximum 3 cartridges - don't overcap
Royal Guard (tank stance) must be active for enmity
tips: Brutal Shell combo gives a small shield and heal - nice sustain
Save cartridges for No Mercy windows when possible

lessons.title: Defensive Fundamentals
lessons.description: Master GNB's defensive toolkit: Rampart, Nebula, Camouflage, and the powerful Heart of Corundum.
keyPoints: Rampart: 20% mitigation for 20s (90s CD) - standard tank cooldown
Nebula: 30% mitigation for 15s (120s CD) - big defensive CD
Camouflage: 10% mitigation + parry rate for 20s (90s CD)
Heart of Corundum: 15% mitigation + heal + shield (25s CD)
tips: Heart of Corundum is extremely strong - use it frequently
Aurora is a HoT that can be used on yourself or allies

lessons.title: Superbolide
lessons.description: Master Gunbreaker's invulnerability: Superbolide mechanics, HP drop, and healer coordination.
keyPoints: Superbolide: Drops HP to 1, then invulnerable for 10s (360s CD)
You WILL drop to 1 HP - healers must heal you after
Can be used reactively when about to die or proactively for big hits
Second shortest tank invuln CD after Holmgang
tips: Don't panic healers - communicate before using Superbolide
Heart of Corundum after Superbolide helps with recovery

lessons.title: No Mercy Window
lessons.description: Master GNB's burst window: No Mercy setup, Double Down, and maximizing damage during the window.
keyPoints: No Mercy: 20% damage boost for 20s (60s CD)
Double Down: Huge AoE damage, costs 2 cartridges (60s CD)
Bloodfest: Instantly grants 3 cartridges (120s CD)
Pack your biggest hits into No Mercy windows
tips: Enter No Mercy with 2+ cartridges for Double Down
Bloodfest every other No Mercy to refill cartridges

lessons.title: Gnashing Fang Combo
lessons.description: Master GNB's signature combo: Gnashing Fang, Continuation weaving, and the full combo chain.
keyPoints: Gnashing Fang: Starts the 3-hit combo, costs 1 cartridge (30s CD)
Each hit enables a Continuation oGCD - weave them!
Gnashing Fang > Jugular Rip > Savage Claw > Abdomen Tear > Wicked Talon > Eye Gouge
This is GNB's most complex and rewarding combo
tips: Never skip Continuation - it's free oGCD damage
Practice the rhythm: GCD > oGCD > GCD > oGCD > GCD > oGCD

lessons.title: Party Protection
lessons.description: Master GNB's party utility: Heart of Light for party mitigation and Heart of Corundum for ally protection.
keyPoints: Heart of Light: 10% magic mitigation for party for 15s (90s CD)
Heart of Corundum can be used on allies, not just yourself
Aurora can also be used on party members for healing
Coordinate party mitigation with healers and co-tank
tips: Heart of Light only mitigates magic - learn boss damage types
Heart of Corundum on healers during heavy damage can save lives

lessons.title: Advanced Optimization
lessons.description: Final lesson: tank swaps, oGCD weaving, Reign of Beasts combo, and optimizing your full rotation.
keyPoints: Sonic Break: DoT attack (60s CD) - use in No Mercy
Bow Shock: AoE DoT (60s CD) - use in No Mercy
Reign of Beasts: New combo from No Mercy, 3-hit chain
Blasting Zone: Strong oGCD (30s CD) - weave on cooldown
tips: Trajectory has 2 charges - save for movement or gap closing
GNB has the busiest rotation - practice oGCD weaving
